channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Loved ones remember Pasco County man killed after tree falls on home
item.description: 64-year-old Mark Godsey died after a tree fell onto his Pasco County home. He leaves behind a wife and son.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Spaceship Earth: Tampa company built Disney's iconic EPCOT dome
item.description: A Tampa company shaped the skyline of Florida's most famous theme park by building the heavy steel frame for EPCOT’s iconic Spaceship Earth.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hudson property dispute: Neighbors demand demolition of troubled home
item.description: A neighborhood in Hudson is demanding the demolition of a troubled property that residents say has turned their street into a dangerous biohazard.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] New Port Richey cryotherapy business offers specialized treatment for retired K9's
item.description: Former working dogs in Pasco County are receiving high-tech medical treatments to ease chronic pain and improve their quality of life after years of service.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Powerball, Fantasy 5 results for July 13, 2026

[BREAKING] [Pinellas County Sheriff] Major Accident Investigation Team (MAIT) Investigates Fatal Vehicle Crash in Seminole (26-065) Deputies assigned to the Major Accident Investigation Team (MAIT) are investigating a fatal vehicle crash in Seminole.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] World Skydiving Day takes flight at Skydive City in Zephyrhills
item.description: Tens of thousands of people took to the skies Saturday as World Skydiving Day united first-time jumpers and experienced skydivers at drop zones around the world.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Why has the US restarted strikes against Iran now?
item.description: The United States launched a third straight day of strikes against Iran Monday, telling lawmakers the measures were meant to defend U.S. interests and civilian traffic against aggression.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 13, 2026
item.description: Family seeks answers after teen found dead in fitting room and Dick's House of Sports, Florida’s attorney general launched an investigation into flour additive, storms continue this week.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] $60M in infrastructure upgrades to St. Pete facility to protect sewage system from future hurricanes
item.description: St. Petersburg officials have finished more than $60 million in infrastructure upgrades at the Northeast Water Reclamation Facility to safeguard the city's sewage system from future hurricane storm surges.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Near-record temperatures and heat index values could approach advisory levels
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida faculty hail Stop WOKE Act court ruling
